title: what did seele know abouth Rei
display_title: what did seele know abouth Rei
wikitext:
[]: what did seele know abouth Rei?             Quote Post by orcot » Tue Jul 21, 2020 7:33 am I have the impression that Gendo tried to keep Rei a secret from seele. However the Obvious sign that she was pilotting a eva, the near canny appearance to their kaworu makes it weird they never showed much intrest in her and she was never asked to appear before Seele for interrogation. Rei also had her history "deleted". Compared to making a false background. Given that Seele has mole agents all over the place they would at least try to obtain some genetic material to look at her origone, this would have set off all sorts of alarms as I beleive they can probably see the difference between adam and lilith. Is their a in universe reason why Seele cares so little aboouth Rei? On a apart note could kaworu been clonend afther Shinji killed him? The kaworu dummy plug system if it emulates Rei's means their probably a fishthank full of naked albino boy's swimming around somewhere in someones basement

[]: Re: what did seele know abouth Rei?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jul 21, 2020 9:43 am Gendo didn't try to keep Rei a secret. They knew of her existence all the way.

[]: Re: what did seele know abouth Rei?             Quote Post by orcot » Tue Jul 21, 2020 10:15 am Blockio wrote: Gendo didn't try to keep Rei a secret. They knew of her existence all the way.

Article: what did seele know abouth Rei
[]: what did seele know abouth Rei?             Quote Post by orcot » Tue Jul 21, 2020 7:33 am I have the impression that Gendo tried to keep Rei a secret from seele. However the Obvious sign that she was pilotting a eva, the near canny appearance to their kaworu makes it weird they never showed much intrest in her and she was never asked to appear before Seele for interrogation. Rei also had her history "deleted". Compared to making a false background. Given that Seele has mole agents all over the place they would at least try to obtain some genetic material to look at her origone, this would have set off all sorts of alarms as I beleive they can probably see the difference between adam and lilith. Is their a in universe reason why Seele cares so little aboouth Rei? On a apart note could kaworu been clonend afther Shinji killed him? The kaworu dummy plug system if it emulates Rei's means their probably a fishthank full of naked albino boy's swimming around somewhere in someones basement
